movie.actors: Gérard Depardieu, Katherine Heigl, Dalton James, Lauren Hutton
movie.plot: A teenage girl on vacation in the Bahamas with her divorced father tries to impress a potential boyfriend by saying that her father is actually her lover.
movie.title: My Father the Hero
movie.writer: Gérard Lauzier (screenplay "Mon père, ce héros"), Francis Veber (screenplay), Charlie Peters (screenplay)
